[2025-09-16T09:38:37] User instructions:
Directives:

* Make often commits and push in the end.
* Make sure the code compiles and runs before submitting your work.
* Never finish without commiting first.
* Do not create new branches
* Use the .agent/ directory as a scratchpad for your work. Store long term plans and todo lists there. Keep the todo file updated and start by checking it.
* Write end to end and unit tests for the project. But make sure to spend most of your time on the actual coding, not on the testing. A good heuristic is to spend 80% of your time on the actual porting, and 20% on the
testing.
* Use the GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable to access github and the user: indie-hub
* Compile the binaries to a top-level folder that contains all the files needed to run.

Goal:

Create a Vulkan app (C++20) using GLFW that opens a window and renders a white triangle on a black background. Use GLM types for math and ImGui to display runtime stats: FPS, frame time (ms), Vulkan device name, and swapchain extent.

Requirements
 * Language/Std: C++20. RAII; const wherever possible; default member init with {}; always use braces.
 * No hardcoded values: Avoid “magic numbers.” Window size, queue indices, formats, sample counts, clear colour, etc. should be derived or stored in named constants/config, not literals embedded in logic.
 * Libraries: Vulkan 1.2+, GLFW (Vulkan surface), GLM (radians, right-handed), Dear ImGui (imgui_impl_glfw + imgui_impl_vulkan).
 * Validation & Debug: Validation layers on Debug; VK_EXT_debug_utils names + markers.
 * Build: CMake (no globbing; list files explicitly). Output to bin/.

Functionality
 * Create Vulkan instance, pick physical device + queue families, create logical device, swapchain, image views, render pass, framebuffers, command pool/buffers, sync (fences/semaphores).
 * Full screen clear to black, draw a single white triangle via a simple graphics pipeline.
 * Vertex buffer with 3 vertices (positions in NDC via GLM types) and a basic vertex shader.
 * Fragment shader outputs white (use a pipeline push constant or UBO for colour; not a literal in the shader).
 * Resize handling: recreate swapchain & dependents on window resize.
 * ImGui overlay showing:
 * FPS and frame time (ms)
 * Vulkan device name
 * Swapchain extent (width × height)

UI/Stats
	•	FPS/frame time: compute from a smoothed delta time.
	•	Device name: query from VkPhysicalDeviceProperties.
	•	Swapchain extent: current width/height.
	•	ImGui draws after scene render, before present.

Acceptance Criteria
	•	Window opens; background is black; a single white triangle is visible.
	•	ImGui overlay shows FPS, frame time, device name, and swapchain extent accurately.
	•	Resizing the window works (no validation errors; triangle still renders).
	•	Validation layers report no errors during normal use.
	•	Builds cleanly with C++20 on Clang/GCC/MSVC; binaries land in bin/.



[2025-09-16T09:39:02] thinking

**Considering shader compilation options**

I'm thinking about the guidelines around coding and shader files. It mentions not writing code in header files, but including binary arrays as .spv files loaded at runtime is okay. We need a way to compile shaders, and while I might not have glslangValidator on my Mac, I could use Homebrew to install it. Alternatively, I could use shaderc to compile GLSL code at runtime, but that adds another dependency. Storing .spv files in the repository seems like a more streamlined approach to keep everything organized.
**Implementing shader solutions**

Considering the time constraints, I’m thinking about how to handle precompiled SPIR-V as static arrays in a .cpp file, which is acceptable. The acceptance criteria suggest that the fragment shader shouldn’t hardcode the color white; instead, it should use a push constant. I can compile the shader to SPIR-V while ensuring it reads a push constant value. Another route might be using GLSL at runtime with Vulkan, but that adds dependencies. I need to keep things minimal while ensuring our triangle pipeline works!

I’m facing some challenges with building and running in this environment, but I have to make sure to compile and run. # TODO

Short-term plan:

- Initialize CMake project (C++20), output to `bin/`.
- Add Vulkan + GLFW + GLM + ImGui dependencies (FetchContent where sensible).
- Implement RAII `App` that creates Vulkan instance/device/swapchain, render pass, pipeline, framebuffers, command buffers, sync.
- Embed SPIR-V shaders in `.cpp` to avoid external tooling.
- Render a white triangle on black; color via push constant.
- Add ImGui overlay (FPS, frame time, device name, swapchain extent).
- Handle resize by recreating swapchain dependents.
- Add a small unit test (FPS smoothing utility).
- Add `tools/` scripts and `README` build/run instructions.

Notes:
- macOS requires MoltenVK and portability enumeration; request extensions accordingly.
- Validation layers in Debug; disable in Release.
- Use angle-bracket includes with project paths.

I’m planning to add a CMakeLists.txt and set up directories. I’ll use FetchContent to include GLFW, imgui, and glm, which will help with portability. For Vulkan, I’ll use find_package(Vulkan), and on macOS, we might rely on brew’s Vulkan SDK. I think it’s important to set the minimum CMake version to 3.25 per AGENTS, include warnings, and define the runtime output directory as bin. [2025-09-16T09:39:58] apply_patch auto_approved=true:
A /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/CMakeLists.txt
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
project(VulkanoCodex VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)

set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /permissive-)
else()
    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion)
endif()

include(FetchContent)

# Dependencies: GLFW, GLM, ImGui
set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
FetchContent_Declare(
    glfw
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
    GIT_TAG 3.4
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glfw)

FetchContent_Declare(
    glm
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git
    GIT_TAG 1.0.1
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glm)

FetchContent_Declare(
    imgui
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
    GIT_TAG v1.91.0
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)

# ImGui backends
add_library(imgui_backend STATIC
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
)
target_include_directories(imgui_backend PUBLIC ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends)
target_link_libraries(imgui_backend PUBLIC glfw)

find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)

add_library(vulkano_codex STATIC
    src/app.cpp
    src/imgui_layer.cpp
    src/shaders.cpp
    src/utils.cpp
)

target_sources(vulkano_codex
    PUBLIC
        FILE_SET HEADERS
        BASE_DIRS include
        FILES
            include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
            include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
            include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
)

target_include_directories(vulkano_codex PUBLIC include)
target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan imgui_backend glm)

add_executable(vulkano_codex_app src/main.cpp)
target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex_app PRIVATE vulkano_codex)

include(CTest)
if(BUILD_TESTING)
    add_subdirectory(tests)
endif()

+project(VulkanoCodex VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
+
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
+
+set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+
+if(MSVC)
+    add_compile_options(/W4 /permissive-)
+else()
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion)
+endif()
+
+include(FetchContent)
+
+# Dependencies: GLFW, GLM, ImGui
+set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glfw
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
+    GIT_TAG 3.4
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glfw)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glm
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git
+    GIT_TAG 1.0.1
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glm)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    imgui
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
+    GIT_TAG v1.91.0
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
+
+# ImGui backends
+add_library(imgui_backend STATIC
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
+)
+target_include_directories(imgui_backend PUBLIC ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends)
+target_link_libraries(imgui_backend PUBLIC glfw)
+
+find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)
+
+add_library(vulkano_codex STATIC
+    src/app.cpp
+    src/imgui_layer.cpp
+    src/shaders.cpp
+    src/utils.cpp
+)
+
+target_sources(vulkano_codex
+    PUBLIC
+        FILE_SET HEADERS
+        BASE_DIRS include
+        FILES
+            include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
+)
+
+target_include_directories(vulkano_codex PUBLIC include)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan imgui_backend glm)
+
+add_executable(vulkano_codex_app src/main.cpp)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex_app PRIVATE vulkano_codex)
+
+include(CTest)
+if(BUILD_TESTING)

+endif()

[2025-09-16T09:40:05] thinking

**Exploring shader setup**

I’m working on crafting a vertex shader with GLSL, specifying positions and using push constants for color. For the fragment shader, I’m aiming to output that color. However, I'm unsure about generating SPIR-V. I wonder if I could utilize a programmable pipeline with the fixed function, but that seems tricky. If we have `glslangValidator`, we could add a CMake command to compile GLSL to SPIR-V at build time. Alternatively, we could vendor it, but that feels a bit heavy.
**Setting up shader compilation**

I'm planning to implement shaders as GLSL files located in the shaders/ directory and set custom CMake commands to compile them into SPIR-V files under bin/shaders/. This way, I avoid embedding SPIR-V directly. If the necessary tools aren't available, the build will fail. To manage this risk, I might include precompiled SPIR-V files as fallbacks. Although, using shaderc could be complex, so I think I'll stick with glslangValidator for build-time compilation, and I'll also prepare to install it via Homebrew if needed.
**Preparing shader compilation**

I'm going to start by adding code and CMake configurations to compile shaders during the build process. If that fails, we can consider installing the necessary tools. I’ll set up the shaders directory with triangle.vert and triangle.frag files. At runtime, the code will load SPIR-V files from either the executable path or the specified bin/shaders path. This way, I’ll make sure the shaders are ready to go!
**Building the App class**

I’m implementing the App class step by step. First, I'll initialize GLFW and create a window, then set up a Vulkan instance with validation layers for debugging and query extensions from GLFW, adding portability. After that, I'll create a surface and select a discrete physical device with graphics and present queues. Next, I'll establish a logical device with the required extensions, set up a swapchain, and create image views. I'll also set up a render pass, pipeline, framebuffers, and command buffers. Finally, I’ll create synchronization objects and set up the main loop to manage rendering events.
**Managing window resize and ImGui**

I’m planning to handle window resizing by setting a flag and waiting for the device to be idle before recreating the swapchain and its dependencies. For ImGui, I’ll initialize the context, set up the style, and prepare backends using the instance, device, physical device, queue, descriptor pool, and swapchain image count. I'll need to create a large descriptor pool for Vulkan. Additionally, I want to measure delta time and maintain smoothed FPS, while displaying an overlay for stats. I’ll keep everything organized in the vulkano_codex namespace and add code files gradually.
[2025-09-16T09:40:18] codex
**Setting up shader compilation**

I'm planning to implement shaders as GLSL files located in the shaders/ directory and set custom CMake commands to compile them into SPIR-V files under bin/shaders/. This way, I avoid embedding SPIR-V directly. If the necessary tools aren't available, the build will fail. To manage this risk, I might include precompiled SPIR-V files as fallbacks. Although, using shaderc could be complex, so I think I'll stick with glslangValidator for build-time compilation, and I'll also prepare to install it via Homebrew if needed.

[2025-09-16T09:40:20] apply_patch auto_approved=true:
A /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
#pragma once

#include <chrono>

namespace vulkano_codex {

class FpsAverager final {
public:
    FpsAverager() noexcept = default;

    void reset() noexcept {
        last_ = clock::now();
        avg_frame_ms_ = 0.0;
        initialized_ = false;
    }

    void tick() noexcept {
        const auto now = clock::now();
        const auto dt = std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(now - last_).count();
        last_ = now;
        if (!initialized_) {
            avg_frame_ms_ = dt;
            initialized_ = true;
        } else {
            // Exponential moving average
            avg_frame_ms_ = smoothing_ * dt + (1.0 - smoothing_) * avg_frame_ms_;
        }
    }

    [[nodiscard]] double frame_ms() const noexcept {
        return avg_frame_ms_;
    }

    [[nodiscard]] double fps() const noexcept {
        return (avg_frame_ms_ > 0.0) ? (1000.0 / avg_frame_ms_) : 0.0;
    }

private:
    using clock = std::chrono::steady_clock;
    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
    bool initialized_ {false};
    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
};

} // namespace vulkano_codex

[2025-09-16T09:40:20] turn diff:
diff --git a/.agent/TODO.md b/.agent/TODO.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..db09552c51cc4643d26cda52d7891e5237a3ca22
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.agent/TODO.md
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# TODO
+
+Short-term plan:
+
+- Initialize CMake project (C++20), output to `bin/`.
+- Add Vulkan + GLFW + GLM + ImGui dependencies (FetchContent where sensible).
+- Implement RAII `App` that creates Vulkan instance/device/swapchain, render pass, pipeline, framebuffers, command buffers, sync.
+- Embed SPIR-V shaders in `.cpp` to avoid external tooling.
+- Render a white triangle on black; color via push constant.
+- Add ImGui overlay (FPS, frame time, device name, swapchain extent).
+- Handle resize by recreating swapchain dependents.
+- Add a small unit test (FPS smoothing utility).
+- Add `tools/` scripts and `README` build/run instructions.
+
+Notes:
+- macOS requires MoltenVK and portability enumeration; request extensions accordingly.
+- Validation layers in Debug; disable in Release.
+- Use angle-bracket includes with project paths.
+
diff --git a/CMakeLists.txt b/CMakeLists.txt
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..69cddd8a147d01c426002ca895f7ea97d9485ac4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
+project(VulkanoCodex VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
+
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
+
+set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+
+if(MSVC)
+    add_compile_options(/W4 /permissive-)
+else()
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion)
+endif()
+
+include(FetchContent)
+
+# Dependencies: GLFW, GLM, ImGui
+set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glfw
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
+    GIT_TAG 3.4
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glfw)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glm
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git
+    GIT_TAG 1.0.1
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glm)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    imgui
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
+    GIT_TAG v1.91.0
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
+
+# ImGui backends
+add_library(imgui_backend STATIC
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
+)
+target_include_directories(imgui_backend PUBLIC ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends)
+target_link_libraries(imgui_backend PUBLIC glfw)
+
+find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)
+
+add_library(vulkano_codex STATIC
+    src/app.cpp
+    src/imgui_layer.cpp
+    src/shaders.cpp
+    src/utils.cpp
+)
+
+target_sources(vulkano_codex
+    PUBLIC
+        FILE_SET HEADERS
+        BASE_DIRS include
+        FILES
+            include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
+)
+
+target_include_directories(vulkano_codex PUBLIC include)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan imgui_backend glm)
+
+add_executable(vulkano_codex_app src/main.cpp)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex_app PRIVATE vulkano_codex)
+
+include(CTest)
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+    add_subdirectory(tests)
+endif()
+

+    }

+    }
+
+private:

+    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
+    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex

[2025-09-16T09:40:25] apply_patch auto_approved=true:
A /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
#pragma once

#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>

namespace vulkano_codex {

class ImGuiLayer final {
public:
    ImGuiLayer() noexcept = default;
    ~ImGuiLayer();

    ImGuiLayer(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
    ImGuiLayer& operator=(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
    ImGuiLayer(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
    ImGuiLayer& operator=(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;

    void init(VkInstance instance,
              VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
              VkDevice device,
              uint32_t queue_family_index,
              VkQueue queue,
              VkRenderPass render_pass,
              uint32_t image_count,
              void* glfw_window);

    void begin_frame() noexcept;
    void end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept;
    void shutdown(VkDevice device);

    void recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue);

private:
    VkDescriptorPool descriptor_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    bool initialized_ {false};
};

} // namespace vulkano_codex

diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..994b0963f138c76b2a948baf6c6a23dde97da1b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class ImGuiLayer final {
+public:
+    ImGuiLayer() noexcept = default;
+    ~ImGuiLayer();
+
+    ImGuiLayer(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+
+    void init(VkInstance instance,
+              VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
+              VkDevice device,
+              uint32_t queue_family_index,
+              VkQueue queue,
+              VkRenderPass render_pass,
+              uint32_t image_count,
+              void* glfw_window);
+
+    void begin_frame() noexcept;
+    void end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept;
+    void shutdown(VkDevice device);
+
+    void recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue);
+
+private:
+    VkDescriptorPool descriptor_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..9cee29f6fe570a503f87287eb7dd4a59ac5477b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <chrono>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class FpsAverager final {
+public:
+    FpsAverager() noexcept = default;
+
+    void reset() noexcept {
+        last_ = clock::now();
+        avg_frame_ms_ = 0.0;
+        initialized_ = false;
+    }
+
+    void tick() noexcept {
+        const auto now = clock::now();
+        const auto dt = std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(now - last_).count();
+        last_ = now;
+        if (!initialized_) {
+            avg_frame_ms_ = dt;
+            initialized_ = true;
+        } else {
+            // Exponential moving average
+            avg_frame_ms_ = smoothing_ * dt + (1.0 - smoothing_) * avg_frame_ms_;
+        }
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double frame_ms() const noexcept {
+        return avg_frame_ms_;
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double fps() const noexcept {
+        return (avg_frame_ms_ > 0.0) ? (1000.0 / avg_frame_ms_) : 0.0;
+    }
+
+private:
+    using clock = std::chrono::steady_clock;
+    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
+    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

diff --git a/.agent/TODO.md b/.agent/TODO.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..db09552c51cc4643d26cda52d7891e5237a3ca22
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.agent/TODO.md
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# TODO
+
+Short-term plan:
+
+- Initialize CMake project (C++20), output to `bin/`.
+- Add Vulkan + GLFW + GLM + ImGui dependencies (FetchContent where sensible).
+- Implement RAII `App` that creates Vulkan instance/device/swapchain, render pass, pipeline, framebuffers, command buffers, sync.
+- Embed SPIR-V shaders in `.cpp` to avoid external tooling.
+- Render a white triangle on black; color via push constant.
+- Add ImGui overlay (FPS, frame time, device name, swapchain extent).
+- Handle resize by recreating swapchain dependents.
+- Add a small unit test (FPS smoothing utility).
+- Add `tools/` scripts and `README` build/run instructions.
+
+Notes:
+- macOS requires MoltenVK and portability enumeration; request extensions accordingly.
+- Validation layers in Debug; disable in Release.
+- Use angle-bracket includes with project paths.
+
diff --git a/CMakeLists.txt b/CMakeLists.txt
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..69cddd8a147d01c426002ca895f7ea97d9485ac4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
+project(VulkanoCodex VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
+
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
+
+set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+
+if(MSVC)
+    add_compile_options(/W4 /permissive-)
+else()
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion)
+endif()
+
+include(FetchContent)
+
+# Dependencies: GLFW, GLM, ImGui
+set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glfw
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
+    GIT_TAG 3.4
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glfw)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glm
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git
+    GIT_TAG 1.0.1
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glm)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    imgui
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
+    GIT_TAG v1.91.0
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
+
+# ImGui backends
+add_library(imgui_backend STATIC
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
+)
+target_include_directories(imgui_backend PUBLIC ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends)
+target_link_libraries(imgui_backend PUBLIC glfw)
+
+find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)
+
+add_library(vulkano_codex STATIC
+    src/app.cpp
+    src/imgui_layer.cpp
+    src/shaders.cpp
+    src/utils.cpp
+)
+
+target_sources(vulkano_codex
+    PUBLIC
+        FILE_SET HEADERS
+        BASE_DIRS include
+        FILES
+            include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
+)
+
+target_include_directories(vulkano_codex PUBLIC include)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan imgui_backend glm)
+
+add_executable(vulkano_codex_app src/main.cpp)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex_app PRIVATE vulkano_codex)
+
+include(CTest)
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+    add_subdirectory(tests)
+endif()
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..994b0963f138c76b2a948baf6c6a23dde97da1b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class ImGuiLayer final {
+public:
+    ImGuiLayer() noexcept = default;
+    ~ImGuiLayer();
+
+    ImGuiLayer(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+
+    void init(VkInstance instance,
+              VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
+              VkDevice device,
+              uint32_t queue_family_index,
+              VkQueue queue,
+              VkRenderPass render_pass,
+              uint32_t image_count,
+              void* glfw_window);
+
+    void begin_frame() noexcept;
+    void end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept;
+    void shutdown(VkDevice device);
+
+    void recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue);
+
+private:
+    VkDescriptorPool descriptor_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

+    }
+

+        last_ = now;
+        if (!initialized_) {

+            initialized_ = true;

+

[2025-09-16T09:40:37] apply_patch auto_approved=true:
A /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
#pragma once

#include <array>
#include <optional>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>

namespace vulkano_codex {

struct QueueFamilyIndices final {
    std::optional<uint32_t> graphics {};
    std::optional<uint32_t> present {};
    [[nodiscard]] bool complete() const noexcept {
        return graphics.has_value() && present.has_value();
    }
};

class ImGuiLayer;

class App final {
public:
    App() noexcept = default;
    ~App();

    App(const App&) = delete;
    App& operator=(const App&) = delete;
    App(App&&) = delete;
    App& operator=(App&&) = delete;

    void run();

private:
    // Window/config
    void* window_ {nullptr}; // GLFWwindow*
    const int initial_width_ {1280};
    const int initial_height_ {720};
    const char* const app_name_ {"VulkanoCodex"};

    // Vulkan core
    VkInstance instance_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkDebugUtilsMessengerEXT debug_messenger_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkSurfaceKHR surface_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkPhysicalDevice physical_device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkDevice device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkQueue graphics_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkQueue present_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    QueueFamilyIndices queue_indices_ {};

    // Swapchain
    VkSwapchainKHR swapchain_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkFormat swapchain_format_ {};
    VkExtent2D swapchain_extent_ {0, 0};
    std::vector<VkImage> swapchain_images_ {};
    std::vector<VkImageView> swapchain_image_views_ {};

    // Pipeline
    VkRenderPass render_pass_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkPipelineLayout pipeline_layout_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkPipeline pipeline_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};

    // Framebuffers and commands
    VkCommandPool command_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    std::vector<VkFramebuffer> framebuffers_ {};
    std::vector<VkCommandBuffer> command_buffers_ {};

    // Sync
    static constexpr size_t max_frames_in_flight_ {2};
    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> image_available_ {};
    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> render_finished_ {};
    std::array<VkFence, max_frames_in_flight_> in_flight_fences_ {};
    size_t current_frame_ {0};

    // Vertex buffer
    VkBuffer vertex_buffer_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    VkDeviceMemory vertex_buffer_memory_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};

    // ImGui
    ImGuiLayer* imgui_ {nullptr};

    // State
    bool framebuffer_resized_ {false};
    std::string device_name_ {};

private:
    void init_window();
    void init_vulkan();
    void create_instance();
    void setup_debug_messenger();
    void create_surface();
    void pick_physical_device();
    void create_logical_device();
    void create_swapchain();
    void create_image_views();
    void create_render_pass();
    void create_pipeline();
    void create_framebuffers();
    void create_command_pool();
    void create_vertex_buffer();
    void create_command_buffers();
    void create_sync_objects();
    void init_imgui();

    void recreate_swapchain();
    void cleanup_swapchain();

    void draw_frame();

    static QueueFamilyIndices find_queue_families(VkPhysicalDevice device, VkSurfaceKHR surface);
    static uint32_t find_memory_type(VkPhysicalDevice physical, uint32_t type_filter, VkMemoryPropertyFlags props) noexcept;
};

} // namespace vulkano_codex

+

+#pragma once
+
+#include <array>
+#include <optional>
+#include <string>
+#include <vector>
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+struct QueueFamilyIndices final {
+    std::optional<uint32_t> graphics {};
+    std::optional<uint32_t> present {};
+    [[nodiscard]] bool complete() const noexcept {
+        return graphics.has_value() && present.has_value();
+    }
+};
+
+class ImGuiLayer;
+
+class App final {
+public:
+    App() noexcept = default;
+    ~App();
+
+    App(const App&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(const App&) = delete;
+    App(App&&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(App&&) = delete;
+
+    void run();
+
+private:
+    // Window/config
+    void* window_ {nullptr}; // GLFWwindow*
+    const int initial_width_ {1280};
+    const int initial_height_ {720};
+    const char* const app_name_ {"VulkanoCodex"};
+
+    // Vulkan core
+    VkInstance instance_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDebugUtilsMessengerEXT debug_messenger_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkSurfaceKHR surface_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPhysicalDevice physical_device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDevice device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue graphics_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue present_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    QueueFamilyIndices queue_indices_ {};
+
+    // Swapchain
+    VkSwapchainKHR swapchain_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkFormat swapchain_format_ {};
+    VkExtent2D swapchain_extent_ {0, 0};
+    std::vector<VkImage> swapchain_images_ {};
+    std::vector<VkImageView> swapchain_image_views_ {};
+
+    // Pipeline
+    VkRenderPass render_pass_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipelineLayout pipeline_layout_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipeline pipeline_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // Framebuffers and commands
+    VkCommandPool command_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    std::vector<VkFramebuffer> framebuffers_ {};
+    std::vector<VkCommandBuffer> command_buffers_ {};
+
+    // Sync
+    static constexpr size_t max_frames_in_flight_ {2};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> image_available_ {};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> render_finished_ {};
+    std::array<VkFence, max_frames_in_flight_> in_flight_fences_ {};
+    size_t current_frame_ {0};
+
+    // Vertex buffer
+    VkBuffer vertex_buffer_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDeviceMemory vertex_buffer_memory_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // ImGui
+    ImGuiLayer* imgui_ {nullptr};
+
+    // State
+    bool framebuffer_resized_ {false};
+    std::string device_name_ {};
+
+private:
+    void init_window();
+    void init_vulkan();
+    void create_instance();
+    void setup_debug_messenger();
+    void create_surface();
+    void pick_physical_device();
+    void create_logical_device();
+    void create_swapchain();
+    void create_image_views();
+    void create_render_pass();
+    void create_pipeline();
+    void create_framebuffers();
+    void create_command_pool();
+    void create_vertex_buffer();
+    void create_command_buffers();
+    void create_sync_objects();
+    void init_imgui();
+
+    void recreate_swapchain();
+    void cleanup_swapchain();
+
+    void draw_frame();
+
+    static QueueFamilyIndices find_queue_families(VkPhysicalDevice device, VkSurfaceKHR surface);
+    static uint32_t find_memory_type(VkPhysicalDevice physical, uint32_t type_filter, VkMemoryPropertyFlags props) noexcept;
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

+#pragma once

+#include <chrono>

+namespace vulkano_codex {

+class FpsAverager final {
+public:
+    FpsAverager() noexcept = default;
+
+    void reset() noexcept {
+        last_ = clock::now();
+        avg_frame_ms_ = 0.0;

+
+    void tick() noexcept {
+        const auto now = clock::now();
+        const auto dt = std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(now - last_).count();
+        last_ = now;
+        if (!initialized_) {
+            avg_frame_ms_ = dt;
+            initialized_ = true;
+        } else {
+            // Exponential moving average
+            avg_frame_ms_ = smoothing_ * dt + (1.0 - smoothing_) * avg_frame_ms_;
+        }
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double frame_ms() const noexcept {
+        return avg_frame_ms_;
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double fps() const noexcept {
+        return (avg_frame_ms_ > 0.0) ? (1000.0 / avg_frame_ms_) : 0.0;
+    }
+
+private:
+    using clock = std::chrono::steady_clock;
+    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
+    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..db09552c51cc4643d26cda52d7891e5237a3ca22

+++ b/.agent/TODO.md
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# TODO
+
+Short-term plan:
+
+- Initialize CMake project (C++20), output to `bin/`.
+- Add Vulkan + GLFW + GLM + ImGui dependencies (FetchContent where sensible).
+- Implement RAII `App` that creates Vulkan instance/device/swapchain, render pass, pipeline, framebuffers, command buffers, sync.
+- Embed SPIR-V shaders in `.cpp` to avoid external tooling.
+- Render a white triangle on black; color via push constant.
+- Add ImGui overlay (FPS, frame time, device name, swapchain extent).
+- Handle resize by recreating swapchain dependents.
+- Add a small unit test (FPS smoothing utility).
+- Add `tools/` scripts and `README` build/run instructions.
+
+Notes:
+- macOS requires MoltenVK and portability enumeration; request extensions accordingly.
+- Validation layers in Debug; disable in Release.
+- Use angle-bracket includes with project paths.
+
diff --git a/CMakeLists.txt b/CMakeLists.txt
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..69cddd8a147d01c426002ca895f7ea97d9485ac4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
+project(VulkanoCodex VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
+
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
+
+set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+
+if(MSVC)
+    add_compile_options(/W4 /permissive-)
+else()
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion)
+endif()
+
+include(FetchContent)
+
+# Dependencies: GLFW, GLM, ImGui
+set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glfw
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
+    GIT_TAG 3.4
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glfw)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glm
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git
+    GIT_TAG 1.0.1
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glm)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    imgui
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
+    GIT_TAG v1.91.0
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
+
+# ImGui backends
+add_library(imgui_backend STATIC
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
+)
+target_include_directories(imgui_backend PUBLIC ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends)
+target_link_libraries(imgui_backend PUBLIC glfw)
+
+find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)
+
+add_library(vulkano_codex STATIC
+    src/app.cpp
+    src/imgui_layer.cpp
+    src/shaders.cpp
+    src/utils.cpp
+)
+
+target_sources(vulkano_codex
+    PUBLIC
+        FILE_SET HEADERS
+        BASE_DIRS include
+        FILES
+            include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
+)
+
+target_include_directories(vulkano_codex PUBLIC include)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan imgui_backend glm)
+
+add_executable(vulkano_codex_app src/main.cpp)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex_app PRIVATE vulkano_codex)
+
+include(CTest)
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+    add_subdirectory(tests)
+endif()
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..850a81dbf40b3c64fb145476c048bdcadd478f35
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <array>
+#include <optional>
+#include <string>
+#include <vector>
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+struct QueueFamilyIndices final {
+    std::optional<uint32_t> graphics {};
+    std::optional<uint32_t> present {};
+    [[nodiscard]] bool complete() const noexcept {
+        return graphics.has_value() && present.has_value();
+    }
+};
+
+class ImGuiLayer;
+
+class App final {
+public:
+    App() noexcept = default;
+    ~App();
+
+    App(const App&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(const App&) = delete;
+    App(App&&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(App&&) = delete;
+
+    void run();
+
+private:
+    // Window/config
+    void* window_ {nullptr}; // GLFWwindow*
+    const int initial_width_ {1280};
+    const int initial_height_ {720};
+    const char* const app_name_ {"VulkanoCodex"};
+
+    // Vulkan core
+    VkInstance instance_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDebugUtilsMessengerEXT debug_messenger_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkSurfaceKHR surface_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPhysicalDevice physical_device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDevice device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue graphics_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue present_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    QueueFamilyIndices queue_indices_ {};
+
+    // Swapchain
+    VkSwapchainKHR swapchain_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkFormat swapchain_format_ {};
+    VkExtent2D swapchain_extent_ {0, 0};
+    std::vector<VkImage> swapchain_images_ {};
+    std::vector<VkImageView> swapchain_image_views_ {};
+
+    // Pipeline
+    VkRenderPass render_pass_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipelineLayout pipeline_layout_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipeline pipeline_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // Framebuffers and commands
+    VkCommandPool command_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    std::vector<VkFramebuffer> framebuffers_ {};
+    std::vector<VkCommandBuffer> command_buffers_ {};
+
+    // Sync
+    static constexpr size_t max_frames_in_flight_ {2};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> image_available_ {};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> render_finished_ {};
+    std::array<VkFence, max_frames_in_flight_> in_flight_fences_ {};
+    size_t current_frame_ {0};
+
+    // Vertex buffer
+    VkBuffer vertex_buffer_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDeviceMemory vertex_buffer_memory_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // ImGui
+    ImGuiLayer* imgui_ {nullptr};
+
+    // State
+    bool framebuffer_resized_ {false};
+    std::string device_name_ {};
+
+private:
+    void init_window();
+    void init_vulkan();
+    void create_instance();
+    void setup_debug_messenger();
+    void create_surface();
+    void pick_physical_device();
+    void create_logical_device();
+    void create_swapchain();
+    void create_image_views();
+    void create_render_pass();
+    void create_pipeline();
+    void create_framebuffers();
+    void create_command_pool();
+    void create_vertex_buffer();
+    void create_command_buffers();
+    void create_sync_objects();
+    void init_imgui();
+
+    void recreate_swapchain();
+    void cleanup_swapchain();
+
+    void draw_frame();
+
+    static QueueFamilyIndices find_queue_families(VkPhysicalDevice device, VkSurfaceKHR surface);
+    static uint32_t find_memory_type(VkPhysicalDevice physical, uint32_t type_filter, VkMemoryPropertyFlags props) noexcept;
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..994b0963f138c76b2a948baf6c6a23dde97da1b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class ImGuiLayer final {
+public:
+    ImGuiLayer() noexcept = default;
+    ~ImGuiLayer();
+
+    ImGuiLayer(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+
+    void init(VkInstance instance,
+              VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
+              VkDevice device,
+              uint32_t queue_family_index,
+              VkQueue queue,
+              VkRenderPass render_pass,
+              uint32_t image_count,
+              void* glfw_window);
+
+    void begin_frame() noexcept;
+    void end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept;
+    void shutdown(VkDevice device);
+
+    void recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue);
+
+private:
+    VkDescriptorPool descriptor_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..9cee29f6fe570a503f87287eb7dd4a59ac5477b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <chrono>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class FpsAverager final {
+public:
+    FpsAverager() noexcept = default;
+
+    void reset() noexcept {
+        last_ = clock::now();
+        avg_frame_ms_ = 0.0;
+        initialized_ = false;
+    }
+
+    void tick() noexcept {
+        const auto now = clock::now();
+        const auto dt = std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(now - last_).count();
+        last_ = now;
+        if (!initialized_) {
+            avg_frame_ms_ = dt;
+            initialized_ = true;
+        } else {
+            // Exponential moving average
+            avg_frame_ms_ = smoothing_ * dt + (1.0 - smoothing_) * avg_frame_ms_;
+        }
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double frame_ms() const noexcept {
+        return avg_frame_ms_;
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double fps() const noexcept {
+        return (avg_frame_ms_ > 0.0) ? (1000.0 / avg_frame_ms_) : 0.0;
+    }
+
+private:
+    using clock = std::chrono::steady_clock;
+    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
+    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

+
+    void tick() noexcept {
+        const auto now = clock::now();
+        const auto dt = std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(now - last_).count();
+        last_ = now;
+        if (!initialized_) {
+            avg_frame_ms_ = dt;
+            initialized_ = true;
+        } else {
+            // Exponential moving average
+            avg_frame_ms_ = smoothing_ * dt + (1.0 - smoothing_) * avg_frame_ms_;
+        }
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double frame_ms() const noexcept {
+        return avg_frame_ms_;
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double fps() const noexcept {
+        return (avg_frame_ms_ > 0.0) ? (1000.0 / avg_frame_ms_) : 0.0;
+    }
+
+private:
+    using clock = std::chrono::steady_clock;
+    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
+    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

+# TODO
+
+Short-term plan:
+
+- Initialize CMake project (C++20), output to `bin/`.
+- Add Vulkan + GLFW + GLM + ImGui dependencies (FetchContent where sensible).
+- Implement RAII `App` that creates Vulkan instance/device/swapchain, render pass, pipeline, framebuffers, command buffers, sync.
+- Embed SPIR-V shaders in `.cpp` to avoid external tooling.
+- Render a white triangle on black; color via push constant.
+- Add ImGui overlay (FPS, frame time, device name, swapchain extent).
+- Handle resize by recreating swapchain dependents.
+- Add a small unit test (FPS smoothing utility).
+- Add `tools/` scripts and `README` build/run instructions.
+
+Notes:
+- macOS requires MoltenVK and portability enumeration; request extensions accordingly.
+- Validation layers in Debug; disable in Release.
+- Use angle-bracket includes with project paths.
+
diff --git a/CMakeLists.txt b/CMakeLists.txt
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..69cddd8a147d01c426002ca895f7ea97d9485ac4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
+project(VulkanoCodex VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
+
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
+
+set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+
+if(MSVC)
+    add_compile_options(/W4 /permissive-)
+else()
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion)
+endif()
+
+include(FetchContent)
+
+# Dependencies: GLFW, GLM, ImGui
+set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glfw
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
+    GIT_TAG 3.4
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glfw)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glm
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git
+    GIT_TAG 1.0.1
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glm)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    imgui
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
+    GIT_TAG v1.91.0
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
+
+# ImGui backends
+add_library(imgui_backend STATIC
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
+)
+target_include_directories(imgui_backend PUBLIC ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends)
+target_link_libraries(imgui_backend PUBLIC glfw)
+
+find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)
+
+add_library(vulkano_codex STATIC
+    src/app.cpp
+    src/imgui_layer.cpp
+    src/shaders.cpp
+    src/utils.cpp
+)
+
+target_sources(vulkano_codex
+    PUBLIC
+        FILE_SET HEADERS
+        BASE_DIRS include
+        FILES
+            include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
+)
+
+target_include_directories(vulkano_codex PUBLIC include)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan imgui_backend glm)
+
+add_executable(vulkano_codex_app src/main.cpp)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex_app PRIVATE vulkano_codex)
+
+include(CTest)
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+    add_subdirectory(tests)
+endif()
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..850a81dbf40b3c64fb145476c048bdcadd478f35
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <array>
+#include <optional>
+#include <string>
+#include <vector>
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+struct QueueFamilyIndices final {
+    std::optional<uint32_t> graphics {};
+    std::optional<uint32_t> present {};
+    [[nodiscard]] bool complete() const noexcept {
+        return graphics.has_value() && present.has_value();
+    }
+};
+
+class ImGuiLayer;
+
+class App final {
+public:
+    App() noexcept = default;
+    ~App();
+
+    App(const App&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(const App&) = delete;
+    App(App&&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(App&&) = delete;
+
+    void run();
+
+private:
+    // Window/config
+    void* window_ {nullptr}; // GLFWwindow*
+    const int initial_width_ {1280};
+    const int initial_height_ {720};
+    const char* const app_name_ {"VulkanoCodex"};
+
+    // Vulkan core
+    VkInstance instance_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDebugUtilsMessengerEXT debug_messenger_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkSurfaceKHR surface_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPhysicalDevice physical_device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDevice device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue graphics_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue present_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    QueueFamilyIndices queue_indices_ {};
+
+    // Swapchain
+    VkSwapchainKHR swapchain_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkFormat swapchain_format_ {};
+    VkExtent2D swapchain_extent_ {0, 0};
+    std::vector<VkImage> swapchain_images_ {};
+    std::vector<VkImageView> swapchain_image_views_ {};
+
+    // Pipeline
+    VkRenderPass render_pass_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipelineLayout pipeline_layout_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipeline pipeline_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // Framebuffers and commands
+    VkCommandPool command_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    std::vector<VkFramebuffer> framebuffers_ {};
+    std::vector<VkCommandBuffer> command_buffers_ {};
+
+    // Sync
+    static constexpr size_t max_frames_in_flight_ {2};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> image_available_ {};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> render_finished_ {};
+    std::array<VkFence, max_frames_in_flight_> in_flight_fences_ {};
+    size_t current_frame_ {0};
+
+    // Vertex buffer
+    VkBuffer vertex_buffer_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDeviceMemory vertex_buffer_memory_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // ImGui
+    ImGuiLayer* imgui_ {nullptr};
+
+    // State
+    bool framebuffer_resized_ {false};
+    std::string device_name_ {};
+
+private:
+    void init_window();
+    void init_vulkan();
+    void create_instance();
+    void setup_debug_messenger();
+    void create_surface();
+    void pick_physical_device();
+    void create_logical_device();
+    void create_swapchain();
+    void create_image_views();
+    void create_render_pass();
+    void create_pipeline();
+    void create_framebuffers();
+    void create_command_pool();
+    void create_vertex_buffer();
+    void create_command_buffers();
+    void create_sync_objects();
+    void init_imgui();
+
+    void recreate_swapchain();
+    void cleanup_swapchain();
+
+    void draw_frame();
+
+    static QueueFamilyIndices find_queue_families(VkPhysicalDevice device, VkSurfaceKHR surface);
+    static uint32_t find_memory_type(VkPhysicalDevice physical, uint32_t type_filter, VkMemoryPropertyFlags props) noexcept;
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..994b0963f138c76b2a948baf6c6a23dde97da1b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class ImGuiLayer final {
+public:
+    ImGuiLayer() noexcept = default;
+    ~ImGuiLayer();
+
+    ImGuiLayer(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+
+    void init(VkInstance instance,
+              VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
+              VkDevice device,
+              uint32_t queue_family_index,
+              VkQueue queue,
+              VkRenderPass render_pass,
+              uint32_t image_count,
+              void* glfw_window);
+
+    void begin_frame() noexcept;
+    void end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept;
+    void shutdown(VkDevice device);
+
+    void recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue);
+
+private:
+    VkDescriptorPool descriptor_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..9cee29f6fe570a503f87287eb7dd4a59ac5477b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <chrono>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class FpsAverager final {
+public:
+    FpsAverager() noexcept = default;
+
+    void reset() noexcept {
+        last_ = clock::now();
+        avg_frame_ms_ = 0.0;
+        initialized_ = false;
+    }
+
+    void tick() noexcept {
+        const auto now = clock::now();
+        const auto dt = std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(now - last_).count();
+        last_ = now;
+        if (!initialized_) {
+            avg_frame_ms_ = dt;
+            initialized_ = true;
+        } else {
+            // Exponential moving average
+            avg_frame_ms_ = smoothing_ * dt + (1.0 - smoothing_) * avg_frame_ms_;
+        }
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double frame_ms() const noexcept {
+        return avg_frame_ms_;
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double fps() const noexcept {
+        return (avg_frame_ms_ > 0.0) ? (1000.0 / avg_frame_ms_) : 0.0;
+    }
+
+private:
+    using clock = std::chrono::steady_clock;
+    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
+    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..5dbab3973478ef8db84e54c1c83776ebf0a9e264

+++ b/src/utils.cpp
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@

+
+// Implementation currently header-only for FpsAverager.
+

[2025-09-16T09:41:29] apply_patch auto_approved=true:
A /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/src/imgui_layer.cpp
#include <vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp>

#include <imgui.h>
#include <backends/imgui_impl_glfw.h>
#include <backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.h>

#include <cassert>

namespace vulkano_codex {

namespace {
    VkDescriptorPool create_descriptor_pool(VkDevice device) {
        std::array<VkDescriptorPoolSize, 11> pool_sizes {
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_SAMPLER, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_SAMPLED_IMAGE, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_IMAGE, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_UNIFORM_BUFFER, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_UNIFORM_BUFFER_DYNAMIC, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER_DYNAMIC, 1000},
            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_INPUT_ATTACHMENT, 1000},
        };
        const VkDescriptorPoolCreateInfo info {
            .sType = VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_POOL_CREATE_INFO,
            .pNext = nullptr,
            .flags = VK_DESCRIPTOR_POOL_CREATE_FREE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_BIT,
            .maxSets = 1000 * static_cast<uint32_t>(pool_sizes.size()),
            .poolSizeCount = static_cast<uint32_t>(pool_sizes.size()),
            .pPoolSizes = pool_sizes.data(),
        };
        VkDescriptorPool pool {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
        const VkResult res = vkCreateDescriptorPool(device, &info, nullptr, &pool);
        assert(res == VK_SUCCESS);
        return pool;
    }
}

ImGuiLayer::~ImGuiLayer() {
    // must call shutdown() explicitly from App with device handle
}

void ImGuiLayer::init(VkInstance instance,
                      VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
                      VkDevice device,
                      uint32_t queue_family_index,
                      VkQueue queue,
                      VkRenderPass render_pass,
                      uint32_t image_count,
                      void* glfw_window) {
    IMGUI_CHECKVERSION();
    ImGui::CreateContext();
    ImGui::StyleColorsDark();

    ImGui_ImplGlfw_InitForVulkan(static_cast<GLFWwindow*>(glfw_window), true);

    descriptor_pool_ = create_descriptor_pool(device);

    ImGui_ImplVulkan_InitInfo init_info {};
    init_info.Instance = instance;
    init_info.PhysicalDevice = physical_device;
    init_info.Device = device;
    init_info.QueueFamily = queue_family_index;
    init_info.Queue = queue;
    init_info.PipelineCache = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
    init_info.DescriptorPool = descriptor_pool_;
    init_info.Allocator = nullptr;
    init_info.MinImageCount = image_count;
    init_info.ImageCount = image_count;
    init_info.CheckVkResultFn = nullptr;
    ImGui_ImplVulkan_Init(&init_info, render_pass);

    initialized_ = true;
}

void ImGuiLayer::begin_frame() noexcept {
    ImGui_ImplVulkan_NewFrame();
    ImGui_ImplGlfw_NewFrame();
    ImGui::NewFrame();
}

void ImGuiLayer::end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept {
    ImGui::Render();
    ImGui_ImplVulkan_RenderDrawData(ImGui::GetDrawData(), cmd);
}

void ImGuiLayer::recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue) {
    VkCommandBufferAllocateInfo alloc_info {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_ALLOCATE_INFO};
    alloc_info.commandPool = cmd_pool;
    alloc_info.level = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_LEVEL_PRIMARY;
    alloc_info.commandBufferCount = 1;
    VkCommandBuffer cmd {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
    vkAllocateCommandBuffers(device, &alloc_info, &cmd);
    VkCommandBufferBeginInfo begin_info {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_BEGIN_INFO};
    begin_info.flags = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_USAGE_ONE_TIME_SUBMIT_BIT;
    vkBeginCommandBuffer(cmd, &begin_info);
    ImGui_ImplVulkan_CreateFontsTexture(cmd);
    vkEndCommandBuffer(cmd);
    VkSubmitInfo submit_info {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SUBMIT_INFO};
    submit_info.commandBufferCount = 1;
    submit_info.pCommandBuffers = &cmd;
    vkQueueSubmit(queue, 1, &submit_info, VK_NULL_HANDLE);
    vkQueueWaitIdle(queue);
    ImGui_ImplVulkan_DestroyFontUploadObjects();
    vkFreeCommandBuffers(device, cmd_pool, 1, &cmd);
}

void ImGuiLayer::shutdown(VkDevice device) {
    if (!initialized_) {
        return;
    }
    ImGui_ImplVulkan_Shutdown();
    ImGui_ImplGlfw_Shutdown();
    ImGui::DestroyContext();
    if (descriptor_pool_ != VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
        vkDestroyDescriptorPool(device, descriptor_pool_, nullptr);
        descriptor_pool_ = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
    }
    initialized_ = false;
}

} // namespace vulkano_codex

+    std::optional<uint32_t> present {};
+    [[nodiscard]] bool complete() const noexcept {
+        return graphics.has_value() && present.has_value();
+    }
+};
+
+class ImGuiLayer;
+
+class App final {
+public:
+    App() noexcept = default;
+    ~App();
+
+    App(const App&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(const App&) = delete;
+    App(App&&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(App&&) = delete;
+
+    void run();
+
+private:
+    // Window/config
+    void* window_ {nullptr}; // GLFWwindow*
+    const int initial_width_ {1280};
+    const int initial_height_ {720};
+    const char* const app_name_ {"VulkanoCodex"};
+
+    // Vulkan core
+    VkInstance instance_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDebugUtilsMessengerEXT debug_messenger_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkSurfaceKHR surface_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPhysicalDevice physical_device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDevice device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue graphics_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue present_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    QueueFamilyIndices queue_indices_ {};
+
+    // Swapchain
+    VkSwapchainKHR swapchain_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkFormat swapchain_format_ {};
+    VkExtent2D swapchain_extent_ {0, 0};
+    std::vector<VkImage> swapchain_images_ {};
+    std::vector<VkImageView> swapchain_image_views_ {};
+
+    // Pipeline
+    VkRenderPass render_pass_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipelineLayout pipeline_layout_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipeline pipeline_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // Framebuffers and commands
+    VkCommandPool command_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    std::vector<VkFramebuffer> framebuffers_ {};
+    std::vector<VkCommandBuffer> command_buffers_ {};
+
+    // Sync
+    static constexpr size_t max_frames_in_flight_ {2};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> image_available_ {};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> render_finished_ {};
+    std::array<VkFence, max_frames_in_flight_> in_flight_fences_ {};
+    size_t current_frame_ {0};
+
+    // Vertex buffer
+    VkBuffer vertex_buffer_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDeviceMemory vertex_buffer_memory_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // ImGui
+    ImGuiLayer* imgui_ {nullptr};
+
+    // State
+    bool framebuffer_resized_ {false};
+    std::string device_name_ {};
+
+private:
+    void init_window();
+    void init_vulkan();
+    void create_instance();
+    void setup_debug_messenger();
+    void create_surface();
+    void pick_physical_device();
+    void create_logical_device();
+    void create_swapchain();
+    void create_image_views();
+    void create_render_pass();
+    void create_pipeline();
+    void create_framebuffers();
+    void create_command_pool();
+    void create_vertex_buffer();
+    void create_command_buffers();
+    void create_sync_objects();
+    void init_imgui();
+
+    void recreate_swapchain();
+    void cleanup_swapchain();
+
+    void draw_frame();
+
+    static QueueFamilyIndices find_queue_families(VkPhysicalDevice device, VkSurfaceKHR surface);
+    static uint32_t find_memory_type(VkPhysicalDevice physical, uint32_t type_filter, VkMemoryPropertyFlags props) noexcept;
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

+#pragma once
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class ImGuiLayer final {
+public:
+    ImGuiLayer() noexcept = default;
+    ~ImGuiLayer();
+
+    ImGuiLayer(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(const ImGuiLayer&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+    ImGuiLayer& operator=(ImGuiLayer&&) = delete;
+
+    void init(VkInstance instance,
+              VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
+              VkDevice device,
+              uint32_t queue_family_index,
+              VkQueue queue,
+              VkRenderPass render_pass,
+              uint32_t image_count,
+              void* glfw_window);
+
+    void begin_frame() noexcept;
+    void end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept;
+    void shutdown(VkDevice device);
+
+    void recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue);
+
+private:
+    VkDescriptorPool descriptor_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..9cee29f6fe570a503f87287eb7dd4a59ac5477b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <chrono>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+class FpsAverager final {
+public:
+    FpsAverager() noexcept = default;
+
+    void reset() noexcept {
+        last_ = clock::now();
+        avg_frame_ms_ = 0.0;
+        initialized_ = false;
+    }
+
+    void tick() noexcept {
+        const auto now = clock::now();
+        const auto dt = std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(now - last_).count();
+        last_ = now;
+        if (!initialized_) {
+            avg_frame_ms_ = dt;
+            initialized_ = true;
+        } else {
+            // Exponential moving average
+            avg_frame_ms_ = smoothing_ * dt + (1.0 - smoothing_) * avg_frame_ms_;
+        }
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double frame_ms() const noexcept {
+        return avg_frame_ms_;
+    }
+
+    [[nodiscard]] double fps() const noexcept {
+        return (avg_frame_ms_ > 0.0) ? (1000.0 / avg_frame_ms_) : 0.0;
+    }
+
+private:
+    using clock = std::chrono::steady_clock;
+    clock::time_point last_ {clock::now()};
+    double avg_frame_ms_ {0.0};
+    bool initialized_ {false};
+    static constexpr double smoothing_ {0.1};
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+
diff --git a/src/imgui_layer.cpp b/src/imgui_layer.cpp
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..48b87624741913e435b8dcb690876bd8c50667e7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/imgui_layer.cpp
@@ -0,0 +1,125 @@
+#include <vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp>
+
+#include <imgui.h>
+#include <backends/imgui_impl_glfw.h>
+#include <backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.h>
+
+#include <cassert>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+namespace {
+    VkDescriptorPool create_descriptor_pool(VkDevice device) {
+        std::array<VkDescriptorPoolSize, 11> pool_sizes {
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_SAMPLER, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_SAMPLED_IMAGE, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_IMAGE, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_UNIFORM_BUFFER, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_UNIFORM_BUFFER_DYNAMIC, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER_DYNAMIC, 1000},
+            VkDescriptorPoolSize {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_INPUT_ATTACHMENT, 1000},
+        };
+        const VkDescriptorPoolCreateInfo info {
+            .sType = VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_POOL_CREATE_INFO,
+            .pNext = nullptr,
+            .flags = VK_DESCRIPTOR_POOL_CREATE_FREE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_BIT,
+            .maxSets = 1000 * static_cast<uint32_t>(pool_sizes.size()),
+            .poolSizeCount = static_cast<uint32_t>(pool_sizes.size()),
+            .pPoolSizes = pool_sizes.data(),
+        };
+        VkDescriptorPool pool {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+        const VkResult res = vkCreateDescriptorPool(device, &info, nullptr, &pool);
+        assert(res == VK_SUCCESS);
+        return pool;
+    }
+}
+
+ImGuiLayer::~ImGuiLayer() {
+    // must call shutdown() explicitly from App with device handle
+}
+
+void ImGuiLayer::init(VkInstance instance,
+                      VkPhysicalDevice physical_device,
+                      VkDevice device,
+                      uint32_t queue_family_index,
+                      VkQueue queue,
+                      VkRenderPass render_pass,
+                      uint32_t image_count,
+                      void* glfw_window) {
+    IMGUI_CHECKVERSION();
+    ImGui::CreateContext();
+    ImGui::StyleColorsDark();
+
+    ImGui_ImplGlfw_InitForVulkan(static_cast<GLFWwindow*>(glfw_window), true);
+
+    descriptor_pool_ = create_descriptor_pool(device);
+
+    ImGui_ImplVulkan_InitInfo init_info {};
+    init_info.Instance = instance;
+    init_info.PhysicalDevice = physical_device;
+    init_info.Device = device;
+    init_info.QueueFamily = queue_family_index;
+    init_info.Queue = queue;
+    init_info.PipelineCache = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
+    init_info.DescriptorPool = descriptor_pool_;
+    init_info.Allocator = nullptr;
+    init_info.MinImageCount = image_count;
+    init_info.ImageCount = image_count;
+    init_info.CheckVkResultFn = nullptr;
+    ImGui_ImplVulkan_Init(&init_info, render_pass);
+
+    initialized_ = true;
+}
+
+void ImGuiLayer::begin_frame() noexcept {
+    ImGui_ImplVulkan_NewFrame();
+    ImGui_ImplGlfw_NewFrame();
+    ImGui::NewFrame();
+}
+
+void ImGuiLayer::end_frame(VkCommandBuffer cmd) noexcept {
+    ImGui::Render();
+    ImGui_ImplVulkan_RenderDrawData(ImGui::GetDrawData(), cmd);
+}
+
+void ImGuiLayer::recreate_font_upload_objects(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool cmd_pool, VkQueue queue) {
+    VkCommandBufferAllocateInfo alloc_info {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_ALLOCATE_INFO};
+    alloc_info.commandPool = cmd_pool;
+    alloc_info.level = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_LEVEL_PRIMARY;
+    alloc_info.commandBufferCount = 1;
+    VkCommandBuffer cmd {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    vkAllocateCommandBuffers(device, &alloc_info, &cmd);
+    VkCommandBufferBeginInfo begin_info {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_BEGIN_INFO};
+    begin_info.flags = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_USAGE_ONE_TIME_SUBMIT_BIT;
+    vkBeginCommandBuffer(cmd, &begin_info);
+    ImGui_ImplVulkan_CreateFontsTexture(cmd);
+    vkEndCommandBuffer(cmd);
+    VkSubmitInfo submit_info {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SUBMIT_INFO};
+    submit_info.commandBufferCount = 1;
+    submit_info.pCommandBuffers = &cmd;
+    vkQueueSubmit(queue, 1, &submit_info, VK_NULL_HANDLE);
+    vkQueueWaitIdle(queue);
+    ImGui_ImplVulkan_DestroyFontUploadObjects();
+    vkFreeCommandBuffers(device, cmd_pool, 1, &cmd);
+}
+
+void ImGuiLayer::shutdown(VkDevice device) {
+    if (!initialized_) {
+        return;
+    }
+    ImGui_ImplVulkan_Shutdown();
+    ImGui_ImplGlfw_Shutdown();
+    ImGui::DestroyContext();
+    if (descriptor_pool_ != VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
+        vkDestroyDescriptorPool(device, descriptor_pool_, nullptr);
+        descriptor_pool_ = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
+    }
+    initialized_ = false;
+}
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+

diff --git a/.agent/TODO.md b/.agent/TODO.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..db09552c51cc4643d26cda52d7891e5237a3ca22
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.agent/TODO.md
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# TODO
+
+Short-term plan:
+
+- Initialize CMake project (C++20), output to `bin/`.
+- Add Vulkan + GLFW + GLM + ImGui dependencies (FetchContent where sensible).
+- Implement RAII `App` that creates Vulkan instance/device/swapchain, render pass, pipeline, framebuffers, command buffers, sync.
+- Embed SPIR-V shaders in `.cpp` to avoid external tooling.
+- Render a white triangle on black; color via push constant.
+- Add ImGui overlay (FPS, frame time, device name, swapchain extent).
+- Handle resize by recreating swapchain dependents.
+- Add a small unit test (FPS smoothing utility).
+- Add `tools/` scripts and `README` build/run instructions.
+
+Notes:
+- macOS requires MoltenVK and portability enumeration; request extensions accordingly.
+- Validation layers in Debug; disable in Release.
+- Use angle-bracket includes with project paths.
+
diff --git a/CMakeLists.txt b/CMakeLists.txt
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..69cddd8a147d01c426002ca895f7ea97d9485ac4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
+project(VulkanoCodex VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)
+
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
+set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
+
+set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
+
+if(MSVC)
+    add_compile_options(/W4 /permissive-)
+else()
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion)
+endif()
+
+include(FetchContent)
+
+# Dependencies: GLFW, GLM, ImGui
+set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glfw
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
+    GIT_TAG 3.4
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glfw)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    glm
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git
+    GIT_TAG 1.0.1
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(glm)
+
+FetchContent_Declare(
+    imgui
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
+    GIT_TAG v1.91.0
+)
+FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
+
+# ImGui backends
+add_library(imgui_backend STATIC
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
+    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
+)
+target_include_directories(imgui_backend PUBLIC ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends)
+target_link_libraries(imgui_backend PUBLIC glfw)
+
+find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)
+
+add_library(vulkano_codex STATIC
+    src/app.cpp
+    src/imgui_layer.cpp
+    src/shaders.cpp
+    src/utils.cpp
+)
+
+target_sources(vulkano_codex
+    PUBLIC
+        FILE_SET HEADERS
+        BASE_DIRS include
+        FILES
+            include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/imgui_layer.hpp
+            include/vulkano_codex/utils.hpp
+)
+
+target_include_directories(vulkano_codex PUBLIC include)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan imgui_backend glm)
+
+add_executable(vulkano_codex_app src/main.cpp)
+target_link_libraries(vulkano_codex_app PRIVATE vulkano_codex)
+
+include(CTest)
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+    add_subdirectory(tests)
+endif()
+
diff --git a/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp b/include/vulkano_codex/app.hpp

+#pragma once
+
+#include <array>
+#include <optional>
+#include <string>
+#include <vector>
+
+#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
+
+namespace vulkano_codex {
+
+struct QueueFamilyIndices final {
+    std::optional<uint32_t> graphics {};
+    std::optional<uint32_t> present {};
+    [[nodiscard]] bool complete() const noexcept {
+        return graphics.has_value() && present.has_value();
+    }
+};
+
+class ImGuiLayer;
+
+class App final {
+public:
+    App() noexcept = default;
+    ~App();
+
+    App(const App&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(const App&) = delete;
+    App(App&&) = delete;
+    App& operator=(App&&) = delete;
+
+    void run();
+
+private:
+    // Window/config
+    void* window_ {nullptr}; // GLFWwindow*
+    const int initial_width_ {1280};
+    const int initial_height_ {720};
+    const char* const app_name_ {"VulkanoCodex"};
+
+    // Vulkan core
+    VkInstance instance_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDebugUtilsMessengerEXT debug_messenger_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkSurfaceKHR surface_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPhysicalDevice physical_device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDevice device_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue graphics_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkQueue present_queue_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    QueueFamilyIndices queue_indices_ {};
+
+    // Swapchain
+    VkSwapchainKHR swapchain_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkFormat swapchain_format_ {};
+    VkExtent2D swapchain_extent_ {0, 0};
+    std::vector<VkImage> swapchain_images_ {};
+    std::vector<VkImageView> swapchain_image_views_ {};
+
+    // Pipeline
+    VkRenderPass render_pass_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipelineLayout pipeline_layout_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkPipeline pipeline_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // Framebuffers and commands
+    VkCommandPool command_pool_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    std::vector<VkFramebuffer> framebuffers_ {};
+    std::vector<VkCommandBuffer> command_buffers_ {};
+
+    // Sync
+    static constexpr size_t max_frames_in_flight_ {2};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> image_available_ {};
+    std::array<VkSemaphore, max_frames_in_flight_> render_finished_ {};
+    std::array<VkFence, max_frames_in_flight_> in_flight_fences_ {};
+    size_t current_frame_ {0};
+
+    // Vertex buffer
+    VkBuffer vertex_buffer_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+    VkDeviceMemory vertex_buffer_memory_ {VK_NULL_HANDLE};
+
+    // ImGui
+    ImGuiLayer* imgui_ {nullptr};
+
+    // State
+    bool framebuffer_resized_ {false};
+    std::string device_name_ {};
+
+private:
+    void init_window();
+    void init_vulkan();
+    void create_instance();
+    void setup_debug_messenger();
+    void create_surface();
+    void pick_physical_device();
+    void create_logical_device();
+    void create_swapchain();
+    void create_image_views();
+    void create_render_pass();
+    void create_pipeline();
+    void create_framebuffers();
+    void create_command_pool();
+    void create_vertex_buffer();
+    void create_command_buffers();
+    void create_sync_objects();
+    void init_imgui();
+
+    void recreate_swapchain();
+    void cleanup_swapchain();
+
+    void draw_frame();
+
+    static QueueFamilyIndices find_queue_families(VkPhysicalDevice device, VkSurfaceKHR surface);
+    static uint32_t find_memory_type(VkPhysicalDevice physical, uint32_t type_filter, VkMemoryPropertyFlags props) noexcept;
+};
+
+} // namespace vulkano_codex
+
